items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson

Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5113 - Absences & Excuses
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5145.6 - Parent/Guardian Notifications

First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 4033 - Lactation Accommodation
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 1113 - District and School Websites
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the October 9 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Redwood City Together to Renew the Partnership for Fiscal Years 2024-26
Approval of Agreement between Puao Te'o Visual Impairment and Redwood City School District for Visual Impairment Services
Approval of the Agreement between Redwood City School District and Aequor for a SPED Occupational Therapist for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Facilities Use Agreement Amendment No. 1 between Redwood City School District and KIPP Excelencia Community Prep
Approval of Amendment No. 1 to the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Amergis Healthcare Staffing Inc. for an Additional Behavior Technician for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of Personnel Report
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Quarterly Williams Report, 1st Quarter, July 2024 through September 2024
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - September 2024
Redwood City School District Review of Connect Community Charter School's Unaudited Actuals for Fiscal Year 2023-24
Redwood City School District Review of KIPP's Unaudited Actuals for Fiscal Year 2023-24
Redwood City School District Review of Rocketship's Unaudited Actuals for Fiscal Year 2023-24
Review the Human Resource Department's Hiring Season in Preparation for the 2025/2026 School Year
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes announced. Board President stated 'we have a motion to approve it' regarding the agenda without indicating any pulled items, reorders, or additions.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: do you have a motion to approve so moved seconded all those in favor I thank you
